# Change-impact map

This map answers: “When I change this, what else must I inspect?” It is a
review frontier, not permission to edit every listed file.

| Change area | Changed paths | Inspect together | Primary checks |
|---|---|---|---|
| Type schema | `src/.memoria/schemas/types/**` | Matching template and folder home<br>Bases and dashboard queries<br>Linter and pre-commit behavior<br>Note-type and frontmatter documentation | `python -m pytest tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_templates.py tests/test_bases.py tests/test_precommit_schema.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Folder home, gated prefix, or skeleton | `src/.memoria/schemas/folders.yaml` | Type schemas and templates<br>Policy and pattern fallback constants<br>Installer scaffold and golden-copy behavior<br>Dashboards and links | `python -m pytest tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_installer_skeleton.py tests/test_policy_mcp.py tests/test_patterns.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Profile capability or path policy | `src/.memoria/tool-registry.yaml`<br>`src/.memoria/lane-overrides/**`<br>`src/.memoria/profiles/**` | Tool registry and matching profile config<br>Lane override and delegation ceiling<br>MCP availability and direct-world prohibitions<br>Profile posture and bundled skills | `python -m pytest tests/test_profiles.py tests/test_policy_mcp.py tests/test_policy_hook.py tests/test_tasks_mcp.py tests/test_skill_lifecycle_dashboard.py` |
| Runtime policy | `src/.memoria/mcp/policy_mcp.py`<br>`src/.memoria/mcp/policy_hook.py`<br>`src/.memoria/plugins/memoria-policy-gate/**`<br>`src/.memoria/memoria_runtime/policy/**` | Lane overrides and gated-prefix schema<br>Audit contract<br>Mutating Obsidian tool mappings<br>Tasks delegation semantics | `python -m pytest tests/test_policy_mcp.py tests/test_policy_hook.py tests/test_tasks_mcp.py tests/test_schemas.py` |
| Ingest or linter engine | `src/.memoria/engines/ingest/**`<br>`src/.memoria/engines/linter/**`<br>`src/.memoria/mcp/ingest_mcp.py` | Calibration and schemas<br>Inbox card contract and shared writers<br>Extract store and source/entity linking<br>Cron wrappers and dashboard fields | `python -m pytest tests/test_pipeline.py tests/test_ingest_mcp.py tests/test_inbox_cards.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Installer | `scripts/install.sh`<br>`scripts/install/**`<br>`scripts/install.ps1` | Installer reference docs<br>Profile deployment and substitutions<br>Disposable-vault behavior<br>PowerShell bridge | `bash -n scripts/install.sh`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_installer_skeleton.py`<br>`bash scripts/e2e-smoke.sh` |
| GitHub workflow or PR policy | `.github/workflows/**`<br>`.github/scripts/pr_policy.py` | Required-check invariant and ruleset assumptions<br>Permissions, event trust, and concurrency<br>Safe and sensitive paths<br>Trusted authors | `python scripts/ruleset-doctor.py`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_pr_policy.py tests/test_ruleset_doctor.py` |
| Documentation or agent guidance | `docs/**`<br>`.agents/**`<br>`AGENTS.md` | Section indexes and guide maps<br>Frontmatter, links, and terminology<br>Referenced commands and repository paths<br>Generated agent references | `python scripts/docs-doctor.py docs`<br>`bash scripts/check-vault-links.sh`<br>`python scripts/status-doctor.py`<br>`python scripts/agents-doctor.py` |

## How to use the map

1. Start from the changed row.
2. Inspect each named contract for drift.
3. Edit only consumers that genuinely need to change.
4. Run focused checks from the row.
5. Use [test selection](test-selection.md) to decide whether the full gate is required.
